targets.expr: sum by(route, application, method) (rate(http_request_duration_ms_sum{application=~"$service", route=~"$api"}[5m])) / sum by(route, application, method) (rate(http_request_duration_ms_count{application=~"$service", route=~"$api"}[5m]))
histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by(route, application, method, le) (rate(http_request_duration_ms_bucket{application=~"$service", route=~"$api"}[1m])))
histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by(route, application, method, le) (rate(http_request_duration_ms_bucket{application=~"$service", route=~"$api"}[1m])))
histogram_quantile(0.5, sum by(route, application, method, le) (rate(http_request_duration_ms_bucket{application=~"$service", route=~"$api"}[1m])))

sum by(route, method, application) (rate(http_request_duration_ms_count{status_code!~"2..|304", application=~"$service"}[5m])) / sum by(route, method, application) (rate(http_request_duration_ms_count{application=~"$service"}[5m]))

sum by(instance, queue_name) (rate(queue_handler_duration_ms_sum{application=~"$service", queue_name=~"$queue"}[5m])) / sum by(instance, queue_name) (rate(queue_handler_duration_ms_count{application=~"$service", queue_name=~"$queue"}[5m]))
histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by(queue_name, instance, le) (rate(queue_handler_duration_ms_bucket{application=~"$service", queue_name=~"$queue"}[1m])))
histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by(queue_name, instance, le) (rate(queue_handler_duration_ms_bucket{application=~"$service", queue_name=~"$queue"}[1m])))
histogram_quantile(0.9, sum by(queue_name, instance, le) (rate(queue_handler_duration_ms_bucket{application=~"$service", queue_name=~"$queue"}[1m])))
histogram_quantile(0.5, sum by(queue_name, instance, le) (rate(queue_handler_duration_ms_bucket{application=~"$service", queue_name=~"$queue"}[1m])))
